snippet: For local excursion emergency or critical incident management, schools must complete the relevant sections within the Risk assessment for local excursions (DOCX) (staff login required) External Link . For all other excursions, schools must complete the Excursion risk register and emergency management plan (ERREMP) template (DOCX) External Link , editing and adding emergency response procedures relevant to their excursion. The Example interstate camp excursion risk register and emergency management plan (DOCX) External Link contains only interstate specific emergency response procedures. For interstate excursions schools can, as needed, copy and paste these interstate specific emergency response procedures into their Excursions risk register and emergency management plan (ERREMP) template (DOCX) External Link . Schools must edit interstate specific emergency response procedures to ensure relevance for their excursion. For adventure activities (including swimming and water-based activities), schools can insert specific emergency response procedures from the Adventure activity specific risk register and emergency management plans External Link . The ERREMP must have clearly written emergency response procedures that:
